title: A True Hero Never Fights Alone

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The big blue sky, fluffy white clouds... The summer of my youth!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's the summer camp! I'm gonna train like CRAAAZYYY! And then,
and THEN...

text_block_list.name: Peppy Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I heard there's a festival tonight! Let's go check it out after
training. It'll be so fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Snippy Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Who said I'm going with you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Mmnmsgh, that was a lucky catch. What a perfect start to the camp.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait, no! I've gotta get ready for practice!
choice_data_list: Without fangirling? Not even a little?
Without fangirling? Not even a little?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I appreciate the consideration, but nope, I'm fine! I'll go get prepped!

...Something feels off. I'm not sure what's wrong, but it happens again
during practice.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whew... Hey, Trainer! I just finished all my laps up and down the
bea...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Those two Umamusume over there are that pair of rivals
everyone's been talking about! The two that seem like mortal enemies
on screen but then they've actually got this super adorable awkward
friendship budding in real life!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fwahaha, and now they're checking out the shops together... Oh no!
The little black-haired one just slipped!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But nooo! The other one catches her by the hand with cyborg-like
precision! A-and neither one of them lets go! Are they gonna keep
walking like that... oh my gosh! Aaa?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Nnnnmsdlk... Hrrnnaksdlajh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Whew. Almost lost my composure there. I swear I felt my soul
leaving my body for a second.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Anyways! C'mon, Trainer! Let's get back to practice!
choice_data_list:
We've got time for a break if you wanna let out
the otaku talk.

We've got time for a break if you wanna let out
the otaku talk.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! N-no, no, no, nope! I'm okay! Let's keep powering through the
training! Now!

And then it hits me. The festival! Maybe she's trying to finish practice
early so she can go simp.
choice_data_list:
When we're done, do you want to head to the
festival?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah! Aaaaah! I'd love to! I can't wait!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So, which stalls should we hit first? I'm cool doing whatever you—

text_block_list.name: Underclassman
text_block_list.text:
Heeey! You've gotta try this shaved ice! They're so artsy, and they've
got some crazy flavors!

text_block_list.name: Upperclassman
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You should see your tongue! It's super bright blue.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: S-so like I said, where to?! What do you wanna see?
The Agnes Digital I know would've stood there staring "respectfully" for minutes. There's definitely something up, so I pull her aside to check if everything's okay.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? The beach? I thought you wanted to see the festival.
choice_data_list: Maybe later. Are you feeling okay, Digital?
Maybe later. Are you feeling okay, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Me? I-I'm fine. Why do you ask?
choice_data_list:
Because you've been avoiding fangirl stuff all
day.

Because you've been avoiding fangirl stuff all
day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What? I'm not avoiding anything! I just wanted to, um...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I wanted to try doing what you want! That's all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I dunno... You always listen to me ramble, and you let me drag you all
over the place.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Having you around supporting my interests has made every day so
much brighter—like I'm living some kinda fangirl dream!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what I'd do without you. I don't think I could go back to
simping alone!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So what I'm trying to say is... you're my partner.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: My otaku partner in crime!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There are so many Umamusume out there, running every day with
passion in their hearts. This is their era—the height of Umamusume
racing is NOW.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Everywhere I look, I see beautiful, dazzling Umas! I could die of moe
any second, but I won't back down. Love is war.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll be their strongest soldier. 'Cause I know that even when my heart's
ready to burst, you have my back. The joy of simping is ours to share.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: We're partners—through thick and thin.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But when I stopped to think about it, when have I had your back? When have I supported you? Never—I've just been getting hard carried this whole time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And I'm not having that! I decided I'd be there to share your interests
and help you chase your dreams!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: So go ahead and fire away! I'll support you one hundred percent!

While I'm flattered... I don't want this to be at the expense of
Digital's interests.

After all, her unending passion for Umamusume is what inspired me to
scout her.
I think my dream is probably...
choice_data_list: I just want to see you smile.
I just want to see you smile.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...What? Wait, my smile? Why would you—

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Do you feel that?! The passion radiating from all those beautiful Umamusume?! Their smiles just fill my heart with so much joy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: You, you see me... the way I see my oshis?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? A wallflower like me? I don't... understand. I'm struggling to
wrap my head around this, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I-I'm glad... I'm honored.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Why'd you have to make things all awkward?! Like, you know that
feeling when you get a really heartfelt comment on a joint fic from
another fanartist?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hrrnnngh! Anyways!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...I won't hide my simping! I'll keep worshipping my oshis! And I'll do it
with the biggest smile you've ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And with that settled, let's hurry and find some Umamusume to cheer
on from the shadows! Got any ideas where to look?
choice_data_list:
The festival dances? Or maybe there are a few
out doing a test of courage in the dark...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Nice thinking, Trainer! Umas dancing side-by-side... or getting
scared and accidentally h-holding hands!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Aaasdjkh—Oh no, I'm getting excited just imagigingnsjkladarrgh!
What're we doing standing around here?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: We've got simping to do, Partner! And I've got your back!
